{{nihongo|'''Takeshigyomeihoutomiinochihikoshinbetsu Shrine (Shinano Province)'''|健御名方富命彦神別神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takeshigyomeihoutomiinochihikoshinbetsu Shrine (Shinano Province)'''|健御名方富命彦神別神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takeshigyomeihoutomiinochihikoshinbetsu Shrine (Shinano Province)'''|健御名方富命彦神別神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].
